utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Given costs are present in other fields, but the “total_budget” field itself lacks breakdown. Interpreting strictly, this may be insufficient. However, the field name says total_budget: complete cost breakdown; since only a single total is provided, I will mark this as not fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified.
